sentences.target: Ce pantalon est souple et agréable.

translations.fr: Ce pantalon est souple et agréable.
translations.en: These pants are flexible and comfortable.
translations.es: Este pantalón es elástico y cómodo.
translations.de: Diese Hose ist dehnbar und bequem.
translations.it: Questi pantaloni sono elastici e comodi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这条裤子富有弹性，穿着舒适。
translations.pt: Estas calças são elásticas e confortáveis.
translations.vi: Chiếc quần này co giãn và thoải mái.
translations.nl: Deze broek is elastisch en comfortabel.
translations.hu: Ez a nadrág rugalmas és kényelmes.
translations.hi: यह पैंट लचीली और आरामदायक है.
translations.pl: Te spodnie są elastyczne i wygodne.
translations.el: Αυτό το παντελόνι είναι ελαστικό και άνετο.
translations.nb: Denne buksa er elastisk og behagelig.
translations.sv: De här byxorna är elastiska och bekväma.
translations.ro: Acești pantaloni sunt elastici și comozi.
translations.cs: Tyto kalhoty jsou elastické a pohodlné.
translations.da: Disse bukser er elastiske og behagelige.
translations.fi: Nämä housut ovat joustavat ja mukavat.
translations.ja: このズボンは伸縮性があり、履き心地が良いです。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner (masc. sg.) marking a specific item; modifies 'pantalon'.
Common noun (masc. sg.); subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular present) linking the subject to predicate adjectives.
Predicate adjective describing the subject via the copula.
Coordinating conjunction linking two predicate adjectives.
Predicate adjective, second conjunct; further characterizes the subject.

sentences.target: Je me sens plus souple grâce au yoga.
sentences.reading: /ʒə mə sɑ̃ ply supl ɡʁɑs o jɔɡa/

translations.fr: Je me sens plus souple grâce au yoga.
translations.ipa: /ʒə mə sɑ̃ ply supl ɡʁɑs o jɔɡa/
translations.en: I feel more flexible thanks to yoga.
translations.es: Me siento más flexible gracias al yoga.
translations.de: Dank Yoga fühle ich mich beweglicher.
translations.it: Mi sento più flessibile grazie allo yoga.
translations.zh-Hans: 多亏瑜伽，我感觉更柔韧。
translations.yue: 多得瑜伽，我覺得自己更柔軟。
translations.ru: Благодаря йоге я чувствую себя более гибким.
translations.pt: Graças ao yoga, sinto-me mais flexível.
translations.he: בזכות היוגה אני מרגיש יותר גמיש.
translations.tr: Yoga sayesinde kendimi daha esnek hissediyorum.
translations.vi: Nhờ yoga, tôi cảm thấy dẻo dai hơn.
translations.ar: بفضل اليوغا أشعر بأنني أكثر مرونة.
translations.nl: Dankzij yoga voel ik me leniger.
translations.hu: A jógának köszönhetően rugalmasabbnak érzem magam.
translations.hi: योगा की वजह से मैं खुद को अधिक लचीला महसूस करता हूँ.
translations.pl: Dzięki jodze czuję się bardziej gibki.
translations.el: Χάρη στη γιόγκα νιώθω πιο ευλύγιστος.
translations.nb: Takket være yoga føler jeg meg smidigere.
translations.id: Berkat yoga, saya merasa lebih fleksibel.
translations.sv: Tack vare yoga känner jag mig smidigare.
translations.ro: Datorită yoga mă simt mai flexibil.
translations.da: Takket være yoga føler jeg mig mere smidig.
translations.ja: ヨガのおかげで、体がより柔軟だと感じます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (1st person singular).
Clitic reflexive pronoun preceding the verb; part of pronominal construction 'se sentir'.
Main verb (1st person singular present) used pronominally ('se sentir') to express state.
Comparative degree adverb modifying the adjective 'souple'.
Adjective functioning as subject complement after 'se sentir'.
Noun used in the fixed prepositional expression 'grâce à' meaning 'thanks to'.
Fused form of 'à + le'; preposition introducing the object 'yoga'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Ta planche est trop souple pour ces vagues.
sentences.reading: /ta plɑ̃ʃ ɛ tʁo supl puʁ se vaɡ/

translations.fr: Ta planche est trop souple pour ces vagues.
translations.ipa: /ta plɑ̃ʃ ɛ tʁo supl puʁ se vaɡ/
translations.en: Your board is too flexible for these waves.
translations.es: Tu tabla es demasiado flexible para estas olas.
translations.de: Dein Brett ist für diese Wellen zu flexibel.
translations.it: La tua tavola è troppo flessibile per queste onde.
translations.ko: 네 보드는 이런 파도에는 너무 유연해.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的冲浪板对这些浪来说太软了。
translations.yue: 你塊板對呢啲浪嚟講太軟啦。
translations.ru: Твоя доска слишком мягкая для этих волн.
translations.pt: A tua prancha é demasiado flexível para estas ondas.
translations.he: הגלשן שלך גמיש מדי לגלים האלה.
translations.tr: Sörf tahtan bu dalgalar için fazla esnek.
translations.vi: Ván của bạn quá mềm so với những con sóng này.
translations.nl: Je board is te flexibel voor deze golven.
translations.uk: Твоя дошка надто м’яка для цих хвиль.
translations.hu: A deszkád túl rugalmas ezekhez a hullámokhoz.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा बोर्ड इन लहरों के लिए बहुत ज्यादा लचीला है.
translations.pl: Twoja deska jest zbyt elastyczna na te fale.
translations.el: Η σανίδα σου είναι υπερβολικά εύκαμπτη για αυτά τα κύματα.
translations.nb: Brettet ditt er for mykt for disse bølgene.
translations.id: Papanmu terlalu fleksibel untuk gelombang ini.
translations.sv: Din bräda är för mjuk för de här vågorna.
translations.ro: Placa ta este prea flexibilă pentru aceste valuri.
translations.cs: Tvoje prkno je na tyhle vlny příliš pružné.
translations.da: Dit bræt er for blødt til disse bølger.
translations.fi: Lautasi on liian joustava näille aalloille.
translations.ja: あなたのボードはこの波には柔らかすぎます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular, fem. sg.); agrees with 'planche'.
Common noun (fem. sg.); subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular present).
Degree adverb intensifying 'souple' to indicate excess.
Predicate adjective describing the subject.
Preposition introducing a suitability/compatibility phrase.
Demonstrative determiner (plural) modifying 'vagues'.
Common noun (plural); object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: On reste souple sur l'horaire aujourd'hui.

translations.fr: On reste souple sur l'horaire aujourd'hui.
translations.en: We’re staying flexible about the schedule today.
translations.es: Hoy nos mantenemos flexibles con el horario.
translations.de: Heute bleiben wir flexibel beim Zeitplan.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我们对时间安排保持灵活。
translations.yue: 我哋今日對時間安排會彈性處理。
translations.ru: Сегодня мы гибко относимся к расписанию.
translations.pt: Hoje vamos ser flexíveis com o horário.
translations.he: היום אנחנו נשארים גמישים לגבי לוח הזמנים.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng ta linh hoạt về lịch trình.
translations.nl: Vandaag blijven we flexibel met de planning.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ми залишаємося гнучкими щодо розкладу.
translations.hi: आज हम समय-सारणी के बारे में लचीले रहेंगे.
translations.pl: Dziś zostajemy elastyczni w kwestii harmonogramu.
translations.el: Σήμερα παραμένουμε ευέλικτοι ως προς το πρόγραμμα.
translations.nb: I dag er vi fleksible med timeplanen.
translations.id: Hari ini kami tetap fleksibel soal jadwal.
translations.sv: Idag är vi flexibla med schemat.
translations.ro: Astăzi rămânem flexibili în privința programului.
translations.da: I dag forholder vi os fleksibelt til planen.
translations.ja: 今日はスケジュールについて柔軟に対応します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun, often used colloquially for 'we'; subject.
Main verb (3rd person singular present) meaning 'remain/stay'.
Subject complement after 'rester' indicating a maintained state.
Preposition introducing the topic/area ('l'horaire').
Noun 'horaire' with attached elided definite article 'le'; complement of 'sur'.
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the action.

Je me sens plus souple grâce au yoga.
Ta planche est trop souple pour ces vagues.
On reste souple sur l'horaire aujourd'hui.
fu: /ʒə mə sɑ̃ ply supl ɡʁɑs o jɔɡa/
/ta plɑ̃ʃ ɛ tʁo supl puʁ se vaɡ/

I feel more flexible thanks to yoga.
Your board is too flexible for these waves.
We’re staying flexible about the schedule today.
